programme.desc: Finnegan, Newbern and Cotten do some wheelie R&D to find out what it takes to put a 1978 GMC Class C motorhome's tires in the air; with the help of pro wheelstander Mike Mantel, the guys take on the challenge of making dreams become reality.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: The 1971 240Z rust bucket known as Rotsun has never failed to fail; David and Mike want to get it back up and running after years of neglect and drive it to SEMA.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: The Cougar and the gear-banging are back, but the car now belongs to Steve Dulcich, and the guys are jerking the haggard Cleveland in favor of a 450hp, 363ci, Windsor-based stroker small-block.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve have a great time fixing the Crusher Impala and testing it with 100-yard burnouts.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: Newbern surprises Cotten and Finnegan with a visit to the sacred grounds of Dennis Anderson's Digger's Dungeon; the guys rebuild a busted-up mega truck and take on Finnegan's childhood idol in a race against the creator of Grave Digger himself.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: The guys try to determine whether a leaf blower can supercharge an engine and make power, starting with a 1978 Monza Spyder with a 305 V8 and a four-speed stick.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: A tank squashes a Prius; a shootout between a Toyota Prius hybrid and a '75 AMC Gremlin is all fun and games until the Prius engine goes up in flames.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger and Finnegan have big fun with retro trail motorcycles on their way to reviving a long-neglected HOT ROD magazine project vehicle, a 1974 Chevy shortbed stepside beater, and road-tripping it to the eighth-mile drags.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: David and Mike cross a rusted 1971 Datsun 240Z with a Chevy 4.3L V6 and a turbo from a Ford Power Stroke Diesel to create the Rotsun; the guys expect the revived Rotsun to dominate in a nine-car autocross showdown.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger and Finnegan rebuild a 1968 Dodge Charger using motor home parts; vehicles making cameo appearances include the Macho Grande, the 1966 Buick Special convertible, the ramp truck and the Fury.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich beat on David's '99 Dodge Ram and Steve's '73 Chevy.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: The legendary '68 Dodge Charger General Mayhem gets stripped of its 707-hp Hellcat engine and all the related electronics; Freiburger and Dulcich vow to take it from the dragstrip setup back to its motorhome 440-powered V8 and gravel-chucking roots.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Sam Strube helps finish the 1931 Model A F-Rod and takes it to the track.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: The guys put John Andrade Jr. in a tiny truck and beat him in a mud drag race with the Dirt Track Camaro; Andrade challenges them to see what they can do with a derelict and parted-out Mustang against his 79 Chevy Malibu.

programme.title: A Day Late and a Dollar Short
programme.desc: Worried that her next asthma attack may kill her, a woman (Whoopi Goldberg) tries to solve the problems of her estranged husband (Ving Rhames) and their four adult children.

programme.title: Beaches
programme.desc: Two youngsters meet on the Venice Boardwalk and embark on a lifelong friendship.

programme.title: Betty and Coretta
programme.desc: After the assassinations of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X, their widows, Coretta Scott King and Betty Shabazz, continue to raise their children and fight for the cause.

programme.desc: Kidnapped at birth in 1998 by a woman she grew up believing was her mother, Kamiyah Mobley sits down exclusively with award-winning journalist Robin Roberts for a revealing interview about life since her true identity was exposed.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A newly hired ghostwriter (Pierce Brosnan) exposes evidence that suggests his late predecessor knew a dark secret about their subject, the former prime minister (Ewan McGregor) of Britain.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: While trying to convince a disgraced ex-cop (Sam Worthington) to come in from a high-rise ledge, a police negotiator (Elizabeth Banks) begins to realize that the man has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent
programme.desc: Facing financial ruin, actor Nick Cage accepts $1 million to attend a wealthy fan's birthday party. Taking on the role of a lifetime, he soon finds himself channeling his most iconic and beloved characters to save himself and his loved ones.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: American Ultra
programme.desc: When his secret past comes back to haunt him, a small-town stoner (Jesse Eisenberg) must use his latent, deadly skills to prevent the CIA from taking him out.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: Awaking from a coma, an assassin (Uma Thurman) seeks vengeance against her former boss and his ruthless gang (Lucy Liu, Vivica A. Fox).

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: Before confronting her former boss (David Carradine), an assassin (Uma Thurman) goes after the man's younger brother (Michael Madsen) and her one-eyed counterpart.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Street
programme.desc: Remo Street thinks his dream of becoming a professional fighter will never come true until destiny takes him in a new direction. A Russian gangster meets him on the street and takes him into the world of bare-knuckle boxing.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection

programme.title: Yellowbeard
programme.desc: A 17th-century pirate in search of treasure. He's accompanied by his son, who has the location of the treasure tattooed on his head. It is a parody on the pirate movies of earlier days.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: A small group of military officers and scientists dwell in an underground bunker as the world above is overrun by zombies.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Welcome to Belko Industries, a normally calm workplace that's about to devolve into a blood-soaked battle royale of bone-crunching horror when 80 employees are locked in their office building and forced to play a ruthless game of kill or be killed!

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: Rodney Dangerfield plays self-made millionaire Thornton Mellon, owner of a chain of tall and fat clothing stores, who, after divorcing his philandering wife, enrolls in college to keep his son from dropping out.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.desc: Rick negocia el precio de unos anillos de cuando los 49ers de San Francisco ganaron el Super Bowl. ¿Podrá lograr una buena jugada? Corey y Rick ponen a prueba un fusil de pesca: ¿descubrirán aguas turbias en las características de este artículo?

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: el correo electrónico, la taza de Joe, secreto de familia Tomb, whezeer, la casa en la calle Baker, el paciente desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: El 9 de mayo de 1980, en la base aérea Mariano Melgar en Perú, el radar detectó un ovni al final de la pista y a una altura de 550 metros.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: Las cintas de la policía, videos y el testimonio de un operador de radar sugieren que se vio algo muy extraño sobre Ohio en 1994, sobre Holland, Michigan en 1994 y sobre Millstadt, Illinois en 2000.

programme.title: Archivos de ovni
programme.desc: ¿Qué sucede cuando un ovni se estrella? Algunos expertos afirman que los restos del ovni e incluso los pilotos son transportados a una instalación ultra secreta en Dayton, Ohio, llamada Hangar 18, ubicada en la Base Aérea Wright Patterson.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Estado paranormal viaja hasta el rancho de Gilliland en el estado de Washington, un semillero de actividad paranormal inexplicable que incluye posibles ovnis en el cielo y criaturas aladas en el bosque.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: La jubilada Carol Ann se mantiene despierta todas las noches grabando las voces de los muertos. ¿Está simplemente documentando o proporcionando un portal para las fuerzas oscuras ansiosas de cruzar?

programme.desc: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other; after causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him without Mom and Dad knowing.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans; Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn's extreme sports superstitions cause chaos; the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with their childhood toys.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, so she teams up with Lily; Lori vows to make up for lost time in her senior year.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby; Luan must enroll in a culinary class.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The siblings turn to Lisa's intelligence to help them land a spot on "Double Dare"; after secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about the exploits their sister writes about.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering; to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local ride-share driver.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Leni, the oldest in the house, struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter; secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Louds' suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola does everything to stop Lana from planning their joint birthday party; Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve a mystery.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa searches for the next big scientific breakthrough; Luna decides whether to play in a band with her friends or play with professionals.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team; Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln tries to game the family gift swap and ends up learning a valuable lesson; a Scrooge-like Flip is visited by three ghosts in a take on "A Christmas Carol.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and his friends try to find another way to get to school after a run in with the eighth-grade bullies on the bus; Lincoln and Clyde are at odds when they discover there's only room for one of their grandmas at Sunset Canyon.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan is locked in a cell in the basement; Mom goes under cover as a student at the high school and becomes best friends with Leni, Luna and Luan.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts; Leni goes toe-to-toe with the mayor in a citywide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Zach and Rusty fake an alien landing, which sends the whole town on a hunt for little green men; Clyde thinks he's guaranteed the Glee Club solo, until Lincoln accidentally auditions and lands the part.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln debe apurar a sus hermanas para no llegar tarde a la escuela; Lincoln consigue la aprobación decisiva para las vacaciones familiares.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln hace todo lo posible por no oír a sus hermanas; Lynn se pelea con Lucy y Lincoln deja que Lynn pase la noche en su cuarto.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere capturar la fotografía perfecta de su familia como obsequio para sus padres por motivo de su aniversario de bodas; Lincoln hace una apuesta con sus hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La nueva piscina de Lincoln resulta demasiado pequeña y él y sus diez hermanas no pueden usarla al mismo tiempo; Lincoln trata de manipular a Lily para que crezca desarrollando la mentalidad que a él le agrada, no como sus otras hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln invita a Clyde a una fiesta de pijamas, pero se pone celoso cuando Clyde quiere pasar tiempo con sus hermanas; Lincoln escucha a escondidas a sus padres y piensa que han decidido deshacerse de sus hijos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lori le regala a Lincoln una bicicleta rosa de segunda mano, pero como siente vergüenza de que lo ven llevándola, le quita a Lori sin decirle a nada su bicicleta BMX; Lincoln investiga por qué el inodoro está atascado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln derrama uno de los experimentos de Lisa, desencadenando una reacción en cadena en toda la casa; Lincoln trata de animar a la familia a dejar de usar tanta electricidad.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene que cuidar la tarántula de la clase; Lincoln decide ir a la huelga hasta que alguien cambie deberes con él.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln va a su primer concierto de rock junto a Luna, quien está decidida a hacerle pasar un momento inolvidable; cuando Lincoln encuentrra un sobre en el ático cree que se trata de un fajo de billetes oculto por alguien de la casa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln entrena a Lana para que sustituya a Lola en un concurso, ya que Lola está enferma; Lincoln y Clyde creen que será sencillo hacer de niñeros de Lilly, pero no lo es.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene las manos ocupadas cuando sus diez hermanas le piden cubrirlas en el mismo día; Bobby y Lori van en una cita doble con Lincoln y la pequeña hermana de Bobby, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln comienza a pasar mucho tiempo en casa de Clyde, porque el padre de éste le presta más atención que su propio padre; Lincoln se monta en una limosina, y después de haber probado el sabor de la buena vida, su actitud cambia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia de Lincoln forma una banda cuando él se inscribe para un concurso de talentos; la madre de Lincoln le ofrece llevarlo a la oficina dental en la que ella trabaja, mientras que sus hermanas van a trabajar con su padre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes, Luan gasta bromas a toda la casa, pero Lincoln este año tiene un plan para evitar caer en ellas; los hermanos Loud van juntos al supermercado a hacer la compra para su mamá, pero Lincoln tiene un plan alternativo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde tienen que empezar un negocio, como parte de una tarea escolar, así que comienzan a ganar dinero con la experiencia de Lincoln tratando con chicas; los miembros de la familia Loud se venden los unos a los otros en una subasta.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde van de acampada para recuperar su hombría perdida; Lincoln consigue a Lori un empleo en una sala de videojuegos que además es pizzería, pero Lori se mete en problemas cuando Lincoln comienza a pedirle favores.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Aunque su madre le obliga, Lincoln no quiere jugar al fútbol americano, pero él tiene un plan para que Lynn lo sustituya; Licoln se vuelve un hipocondríaco después de que Lucy le augure que su día terminará en un desastre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln accidentalmente le arreglan cuatro citas para el baile Sadie Hawkins en la escuela; cuando Lincoln y Bobby se hacen amigos, Lori se dispone a poner a Bobby celoso pasando el tiempo con Clyde.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln desearía tener diez hermanos en lugar de diez hermanas, pero Lisa le abre los ojos y le enseña cuál es la realidad; Lola quiere formar parte de un club secreto de hermanos, pero sus hermanos no son tan partidarios.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln empieza a acaparar la atención cuando se convierte en asistente de Luan; los ruidosos niños se divierten en un día nevado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln se enamoran de su nuevo profesor particular, por lo que él no puede estudiar; los niños se quejan de su casa, pero cuando un tornado la destruye, cambian de manera de pensar.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde hacen una pasantia donde Flip, obteniendo el título de gerentes; Lincoln, preocupado por lo aburrida que se ha vuelto la vida diaria del abuelo, lo lleva afuera para pasar juntos una jornada memorable.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde le pide consejo a Lincoln sobre cómo ser un buen hermano mayor porque se ha enterado de que sus padres van a tener otro hijo; Lori y Leni han comprado dos vestidos idénticos, lo que origina una discusión tremenda en casa de los Loud.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando los Laud ganan un viaje a un complejo, deciden llevar a sus hijos con ellos porque estos prometieron comportarse; cuando Lucy se enamora de un chico normal y corriente, su hermana decide cambiarle el look.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La posición social de Lincoln está en juego cuando su hermana de 4 años de edad entra en su clase de quinto grado; los niños se cansan de que la camioneta familiar se malogre, por lo que deciden tratar de engañar a papá para que compre una nueva.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lola y Lana quieren ser scouts, pero se dan cuenta de que una está más capacitada que la otra para lograrlo; Lincoln y Clyde creen que Bobby está engañando a Lori, por lo que lo siguen a todos lados para recabar pruebas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Papá se enfada con los niños porque nunca cierran la puerta principal de la vivienda, por lo que decide tomar medidas para asegurar que la vivienda esté protegida; Lincoln borra sin querer sus fotos de infancia y Clyde y él intentan recrearlas.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kiki and Kat were coworkers who fell in love. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to take their relationship to another level…and person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cindy feels no love at all for her sister, Morgan. She will tell her today that she is stealing Morgan's man for good! Next Emario wants to marry Kathryn, but first she needs to come clean and reveal her secret profession as a prostitute!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The show continues with more past guests returning to add to the mayhem!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trish says that her on-and-off boyfriend Jake is awful and cheating, but Jake says she's lying. Will Chante's lie detector test results finally convince Walter that she's not cheating and ready for a relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 16-year-old Desire ran away from home about a month ago. Since then the only contact she's had with her mother are random text messages telling her that she's still alive. Desire says she always risked abuse and could never confide in her mother.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Dennis, ex-girlfriend Kendal refuses to let him go and keeps him around by lying about being pregnant. He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve's DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle's boyfriend Ashley is too close to Tenielle's daughter! Latoya and the child's father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend Marie that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie suspects that her boyfriend has been cheating, but she never expected with her best friend, Allison! Next Jose's 2 boyfriends didn't know that they've been sharing Jose. Finally, Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michele forces her boyfriend to choose between her and his mistress Morgan. Then Rose wants her husband's mistress, Denise, to back off. But there's a catch! Next Dena is here to tell her boyfriend that she's found someone to give her attention.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests are here today to reveal secrets to their loved ones that may change their relationships forever.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Es la batalla de los ex! Tony lucha para recuperar a su ex-amante. Richard le cuenta a su esposa que ha tenido un romance y ve a Lisa, su ex-amante, luchar por recuperarlo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En el Show de Jerry Springer de hoy, una batalla de novias. Nicole le da un ultimátum a su amante: o la dejas o me pierdes. ¡Jerry ve cómo saltan chispas en el programa de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Je'nier tiene un secreto difícil de contar a Preston. Después, ¡son Nikki y Nikky las que persiguen al mismo hombre! ¿Ganará Nikki o Nikky el corazón de Kevin? ¿Kevin merece el amor de alguna de las dos mujeres?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nikki revela sus aventuras fraternales secretas, pero ¿podrá Joe perdonarla? Después, "Six O'Clock" confiesa que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su amiga Carisa por dinero.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Johnny quiere que su novia Aimee lo acepte como es. Después, Maya viene al programa para confrontar a su novio Eric sobre sus costumbres.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En este episodio especial, un grupo de espectadores selectos se enfrentará a algunos de los más memorables invitados de Jerry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy espera la llegada de su futura esposa elegida irresponsablemente al azar, después del lanzamiento de su anuncio de prensa, para cumplir con la cláusula de testamento impuesta por Gertrudis.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de tanto silencio y tantos planes que expresó con emoción Willy, Mariana decide hablar de su anterior compromiso matrimonial para así descartar la idea de que su amor es posible.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En la universidad, Willy y Mariana se besan tras su reunión, dándole la oportunidad a Margot de descubrir quién es su rival. Valentín no tiene otra opción que rendirse ante el chantaje de Natalia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Camelia se van de viaje en el yate pero se presenta en el muelle, Patricio. Camelia lo ve y se queda con la excusa de que dejó la cartera en el carro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La avioneta dañada pasa por encima de Rosaura. Mairita llorando le pregunta a Anselmo si Rosaura va a regresar. Anselmo le dice que a lo mejor no. Rosaura ve la avioneta y comienza a gritar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita esconde la ropa de Luis Mario para verlo desnudo. Rosaura llega a darle la comida a Luis Mario y está totalmente desnudo. No sabe que Rosaura está con el.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le dice a Eduarda que se va a casar pero no con Eva. Ella trata de averiguar quién es la mujer pero él no se lo dice. El doctor va a ver a doña Cruz y les dice que la dejen dormir.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Monkey Thieves (Dooya)

programme.title: Get Wild

programme.title: Wild Asia

programme.title: Snake Boss

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia

programme.title: Give Me Shelter

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man

programme.desc: Mark comes across a snowflake eel in Queensland, Australia!

programme.desc: A grizzly bear charges a taxidermist, and a shark goes after a spearfisher.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A lack of food forces the remaining participants to get creative. One survivalist devises an ingenious method for getting protein while another battles Patagonia's wiliest predator.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining participants struggle to adapt to life in Patagonia. One survivor comes face to face with a stealth cat, and another takes on a major build project.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging blades out of steel from a chain and a sprocket. Only two will secure a spot in the final round, where they have to forge the iconic Karabela saber.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must combine two or more steels to forge J. Nielson's favorite blade, a Damascus European dagger. In the final round, two finalists must forge a fearsome pole weapon--the Zande Spear.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with making blades using only harvested steel and coal forges. After two rounds, the remaining two smiths must recreate a dangerous folding weapon -- the Spanish Navaja.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The pressure is on as four smiths are tasked with forging Dave Baker's favorite blade, the Scottish Dirk. Only two smiths advance to the final round where they must recreate the German Halberd.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 10 contestants that includes the ladies battling with posing instructor Benny Ninja and his team, New York City firefighters practicing their runway struts and contestant wrestling matches.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Paulina drops by the loft to surprise the girls with tips on how to behave during press interviews and while attending public events.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for a teenage girl, Clare Metcalf (AMBER TAMBLYN), who disappears from a mental hospital after she suffers an extreme psychotic episode.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a recently retired U.S. Army officer who disappears following a dinner in his honor given by former members of his Vietnam platoon.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a tenacious television reporter, Delia Rivers (APRIL GRACE), after she disappears in the middle of a dangerous, high-profile investigation.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack's squad looks for a young, idealistic and dedicated schoolteacher, Josh Abrams (CHRISTOPHER GORHAM), who disappeared after teaching a night class in the Bronx.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a boxer, Dante Jones, who vanishes before a much-anticipated fight at Madison Square Garden. Jones' career was better than ever when he disappeared.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack is at the center of an investigation into how missing persons cases have been handled, including such controversial cases as that of Graham Spaulding, an accused pedophile.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, Jack and his team search for an office worker, Sydney Harrison (MARSHA DIETLEIN BENNET), who disappeared from her building.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In part two of a two-part season finale, Jack's squad must determine the best course of action when Samantha is shot and possibly critically injured in a hostage situation.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a school bus full of students goes missing during its morning run in a wealthy district, Jack and the team suspect two troublemaking students, brothers Doug and Richard Carrol.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team try to find a priest, Father Henry Stephens (HECTOR ELIZONDO), who disappears from his church shortly after learning that he needs a liver transplant to survive.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie, OA and the team must stop a hacker who is disabling life-saving equipment in several New York City hospitals, while demanding a full investigation into the recently deceased patients of a local psychiatric facility.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the team finds a connection between bombings at government agencies and a private veterans' club in New York City, Isobel tells OA to recruit his former Army buddy, Chris (Cleveland Berto), for intel since he spends time at the club.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team hunts for a serial killer who is targeting young,homeless men. Tiffany and Scola don't see eye to eye on how to handle the case or the difference between partners.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a suburban woman is kidnapped from her home, the team looks into trysts on both sides of a seemingly perfect marriage. Also, OA feels pressure from Mona to make changes in his career path.

programme.title: Bronson
programme.desc: With an intelligent, provocative and stylized approach, BRONSON (based on a true story) follows the metamorphosis of Mickey Peterson into Britain’s most violent prisoner, Charles Bronson.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller as the Chief of Police of a small town who finds himself caught in the eye of a storm as he investigates the murder of a woman he was secretly seeing….because all the evidence points to him!

programme.title: Brawl in Cell Block 99
programme.desc: When Bradley (Vince Vaughn) is sent to prison, he is forced to commit acts of violence that turn the place into a savage battleground.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his family.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Clive Owen & Billy Crudup star in a gritty crime thriller about two brothers on opposite sides of the law. Loyalties are tested when they face off over organized crime in 1974 Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Nemesis
programme.desc: The year is 2027 and troubled cyborg cop Alex is ordered to apprehend his former partner Jared, accused of smuggling data to information terrorists plotting to kill government officials.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Xavier Quinn is the police chief of a tiny Caribbean island. He is on good terms with all. When a prominent businessman is murdered, Quinn, like everyone else, believes that the killer is Maubee--a local folk hero and Quinn's childhood friend.

programme.title: Eight Million Ways to Die
programme.desc: Crime drama based on the novel by Lawrence Block. An ex-Sheriff embarks on an unrelenting mission to avenge the death of a young prostitute at the hands of a ruthless pimp. How far will he go to see justice served?

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: When a devastating loss in the ring leaves Lion (Jack O'Connell) and his manager brother Stan (Charlie Hunnam) in debt to a local crime boss, they are forced to risk it all in a bare-knuckle boxing tournament, as the pair fight for a better life.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A disillusioned war veteran, Rannulph Junah, agrees to play a game of golf. He finds the game futile until his caddy, Bagger Vance, teaches him the secret of the authentic golf stroke.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: An inspirational account of basketball coach Ken Carter, who received both praise and criticism when he made headlines for benching his entire undefeated team for poor academic performance.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A disillusioned war veteran, Rannulph Junah, agrees to play a game of golf. He finds the game futile until his caddy, Bagger Vance, teaches him the secret of the authentic golf stroke.

programme.title: My Week With Marilyn
programme.desc: An assistant on the set of THE PRINCE AND THE SHOWGIRL documents the week he spent befriending Marilyn Monroe (Michelle Williams) and helping her escape the pressures of fame and Hollywood.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: A thrilling misadventure involving three ingenious orphans and a villainous actor named Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) who wants their enormous fortune.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits the birthplace of Mexico’s most famous spirit, the town of Tequila, where she learns about the history of tequila making and gets an up-close look at the whole process from the agave fields to the tasting table.

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Los asesinatos de Midsomer

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Yukon Men

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: Spring brings predators to Tanana, and Stan loses a sled dog to a hungry bear. The Yukon River begins to thaw at an alarming rate, and the villagers must quickly move to high ground. The town gas pump breaks, putting a halt to flood preparations.

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: As floodwaters surge threatening the village, valuable driftwood is left flowing in the wake. James takes to the river to stock up but his own son turns his back on him. Joey also races upriver but ends up stranded. Pat hires a helper from New Zealand.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica comprueba que espera un hijo de Alejandro y lo busca para darle la noticia, pero él se muestra tan frío que ella decide marcharse. David enfrenta a Verónica para defender a su abuela, pero ella se mantiene firme. Rodrigo interroga a Guerra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma buscan a Dínora, la ven en una vergonzosa situación y ella no puede aclarar lo que pasó, atrapada en su red de mentiras. Gabriela y Fernando le echan a perder la fiesta a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta furioso al darse cuenta de que le arruinaron su mejor fiesta, Norma le reclama a Gabriela su complicidad con Dínora y corre a buscar a Juan, su madre acepta que se casen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula se comunica con Adela para conocer la situación en la hacienda. Esteban está dispuesto a traicionar a Paula, mientras José pierde la oportunidad de quitarle el niño a Beatriz. Julieta quiere comprar un bebé y se torna violenta en el pueblo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Nacho trata de manipular a Lucas para ponerlo en contra de Rosario, luego le pone una trampa a Consuelo y la viola. La desesperación de Julieta por un hijo hace que le pida a Pedro que embarace a una mujer para que le robe el bebé y se lo dé.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan no deja de pensar en Paula. El doctor le dice a Julieta que la quimioterapia dio resultados. Julieta se pone agresiva y le da una cachetada, ella cree que Juan la dejará si se recupera. Consuelo llega a la casa maltratada por la violación.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le exige a su madre que le diga quién es su padre. Pedro se da cuenta que Julieta finge y usa su enfermedad para manipular a todos. Esteban le cuenta a José la ubicación de Paula y Sofía. Consuelo oculta la verdad a Rosario sobre la violación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gastón cuenta en su programa de radio que Antonia Guerra es la dueña del prostíbulo. Antonia hace firmar a Aníbal un documento donde pone sus bienes a nombre de ella, para protegerlos de Constanza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Una bomba cae en San Pedro: Verónica hace circular fotos de cuando Antonia era prostituta y dueña del burdel. Alejandro se enoja con las imágenes, mientras Guerra no puede frenar los ataques en su contra. Chacón quiere colaborar con la justicia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica y Alejandro discuten fuerte y terminan. Y todo por el ataque contra la patrona Guerra. David vuelve a vivir con su abuela. Rodrigo ordena el cierre de La casa de las muñecas por el asesinato del Chopo. Antonia intenta acercarse a Alejandro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica comprueba que espera un hijo de Alejandro y lo busca para darle la noticia, pero él se muestra tan frío que ella decide marcharse. David enfrenta a Verónica para defender a su abuela, pero ella se mantiene firme. Rodrigo interroga a Guerra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma buscan a Dínora, la ven en una vergonzosa situación y ella no puede aclarar lo que pasó, atrapada en su red de mentiras. Gabriela y Fernando le echan a perder la fiesta a Martín.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Having shaken off the shock of the fourth elimination, the seven remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Theater of Musical Comedy in Krasnoyarsk, Siberia, Russia, and receive a clue instructing them to ride the Trans-Siberian Railway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams depart from their Pit Stop at the Siberian Colosseum, leaving the cold of Siberia and flying nearly 2,000 miles to the heat of Jaipur, India.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams set off from the Jaigur Fort in Jaipur, India and receive a clue instructing them to fly nearly 2,000 miles to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining five teams take off from their Pit Stop at the Wat Thep Nimit Temple in Phuket, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to fly over 400 miles to Bangkok, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams set off from the eighth Pit Stop at a royal palace in Bangkok, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to travel over 1,000 miles to Guilin, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams set off from their Pit Stop at the park of the Sun and Moon Pagodas in Guilin, China and receive a clue instructing them to fly north, over 1,000 miles, to Beijing.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining four teams learn that the destination that they have reached is not a Pit Stop and they are still racing. They search the area shops of a Bei Hei streets for a Travelocity roaming gnome, which they must keep until the leg's Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the fourteenth season's finale, the final three teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Bird's Nest Stadium in Beijing, China and travel over 5,000 miles to Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Twelve Teams stand at the start line in Los Angeles, Calif., but only 11 will make the journey to Tokyo, Japan as the Racers are faced with a heart-breaking surprise elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle to combat the hectic pace of Vietnam and one Team puts their own Race in jeopardy by offering to help the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams scramble to spot royalty in the jam-packed streets of Cambodia and one Team monkeys around and breaks the Race's cardinal rule by losing their passport.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams sweat it out searching sand dunes for water in the blistering sun and one racer decides to help his competition hoping karma will be on their side in the end.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams slide six stories into a shark tank and one racer must conquer her fear of heights to make it through this leg of the race.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tickets Gomer for a U-turn and is then detained in a citizen's arrest by Gomer for the same thing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his chums take their roles as Robin Hood and his merry men seriously as they befriend a hobo at the expense of the pantries of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney organizes a rescue party when Andy and Helen are trapped in a cave by a landslide.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie learns a lesson in friendship when he befriends a newcomer to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee stirs up a crusade for a chicken farmer whose property has been condemned to make way for a new road.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass is a would-be Romeo, who is brought into the sheriff's home in an effort to teach him some manners.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis Campbell acquires a car and threatens life and limb of Mayberry's pedestrian population.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out-sings him for a part in the Mayberry Choir. Andy Griffith's wife, Barbara, appears in this episode as a member of the singing group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relax with Bob Ross as the perfect picnic spot emerges from his paint filled brushes - quiet peaks on a tranquil lake and luscious green velvety grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old gnarly tree and snow-capped fence to mark the line between home and the edge of the winter blanketed forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A gentle bubbling stream in the midst of the forest - Bob Ross invites you to share the serenity of Nature's escape with this delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross shows you how two beautiful mountain and evergreen oval scenes can be harmonized into one memorable masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An incredibly unique Bob Ross painting -- delight in the effects of white and black gesso discover a birch tree forest perfectly mirrored in the cold stillness of winter.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a meadow where evening breezes blow upon soft grasses and where you feel the warmth from a rustic little cabin.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Faraway peaks appear to almost float amongst the clouds as Bob Ross creates a gently flowing river splashing into the foreground.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch guest artist Steve Ross paint an incredibly beautiful, bright and happy mountain scene with fabulous evergreens and foothills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross finds a barely visible lake being hugged by snowy mountains and some of nature's finest greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross's icy-blue mountains, evergreens, and lacy-like bush clusters capture the mood of a cold snowy day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beautiful foliage and fierce skies with an almighty mountain overlooking a calm lake. Watch Bob Ross paint this challenging scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Evening sky sets in, giving way to a perfect glow -- watch a black canvas come to life under the magic brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the still of the night, trees reflect off the glistening pond and cool breeze of blows as Bob Ross takes you on this black canvas adventure.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The day's sun is almost gone, but Bob Ross finds what's left of it in this unusual blend of late afternoon tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Truly picture perfect. A bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A visit with Bob Ross takes you to a secluded cabin, snuggled deep into the blankety drifts of fluffy snow, far into the frozen mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow the old dirt road to that quaint country barn nestled in nature's greenery - Bob Ross paints your destination today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft misty background, sweet snow-kissed cabin, and rich trees and bushes - all nestled down inside a winter oval painting by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Discover a purple night-sky scene with a mountain overlooking a little falling river -- Bob Ross creates a spectacular masterpiece today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees, and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross enhances the beauty of this lovely mountain scene with a splashing waterfall amidst lovely fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The soft sky and snow-blanketed ground give this cozy barn a quiet place to sleep and dream a while; Bob Ross's paintbrushes make it happen.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses beautiful shades of green that burst forth in this exciting and realistic display of nature's wonder.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's such a tranquil day down at the beach! Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely little rowboat that awaits its owner's return.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The Evan, Kenny, Susie, Johanna alliance continues to reign supreme, and Johnny becomes increasingly insecure about his place in the group.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Winding down to the final challenges, the two teams are tied, but the strength clearly lies with the Champions. And the Challengers desperately need a win in order to get rid of their weakest link.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Anger and frustration take hold of the Challengers as KellyAnne and Dunbar wage war over unresolved sexual issues, and Brad makes a decision that could change the course of the competition.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: In The Ruins, Dunbar, and Kimberly fight to keep the Challengers' dream alive. And, in a strategic move, the Champions consider throwing the next challenge to give them a stronger position in the final. But not everyone agrees.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The Champions become paranoid that they could lose in the end if one worrisome team member fails to pull their weight. The Champions and the Challengers take part in a nail-biting finale – a grueling race for the $300,000 prize!

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Thirteen eager rookies join thirteen seasoned veterans in the Fresh Meat II Challenge with $300,000 at stake. The teams are picked, alliances are formed, and the backstabbing begins.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: It's a full-on war between the two dominant alliances. But the trouble really begins when someone unaligned with either side is calling the shots.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Is it Team Wes or Team Kenny? Alliances are split between the two rivals, and a secret mole flies under the radar making one alliance stronger.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: What would have been THE most underhanded move to date is foiled when an injury takes one team out of the competition. Will Kenny find out there's a traitor in his midst?

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Things get ugly when the competition turns best friends Danny and Wes against each other. And the Exile threatens to break up a budding romance.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: All of the creatures on today’s countdown are livin’ large! Join Jungle Jack as he counts downs the biggest land animals on the planet – hippos, rhinos, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his grandson on safari to Tanzania's Selous Game Reserve, the largest reserve in Africa. They encounter territorial hippos, nesting crocodiles along with elephant, giraffe, impala and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wickedly Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along if you dare as Jungle Jack is counting down hair-raising true stories from the sea, land and air! Face-to-face encounters with bats, caiman, snakes, plus real dragons, on this Wickedly Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, Jack gets behind the wheel to experience “The Wilds,” the largest zoological reserve in North America.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for some epic Hanna family adventures like game ranger training in South Africa, babysitting a wombat in Tasmania, trekking with mandrills in Gabon, a horseback safari through Montana and a trip to meet some donkeys in Arizona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join the Hanna family as they literally see-through this species, release an endangered sea turtle and learn just how important bats are to the ecosystem…and to inspecting Jack's hair!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins the massive operation to relocate several Big Horns from Tonto National Forest to the Catalina Mountains in an effort to reintroduce the animals back into their native range.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Marsupials
programme.desc: From hairy-nosed wombats and legendary white wallabies to red kangaroos and fierce Tasmanian devils, this Wild Countdown hops along with ten magical moments with marsupials!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack joins the conservationists racing to save incredible species from extinction. Sea Turtles, Giraffe, Painted Dogs, Cheetahs, Whooping Cranes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes, and butterflies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Pach-yderm
programme.desc: Join Jack for a colossal countdown with the mighty pachyderms! From the biggest land mammal in the world, the African elephant, to Borneo’s pygmy elephant, Jungle Jack is counting down his favorite elephant encounters all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets creatures thriving in their tropical island homes, like the Bison of Catalina Island, Flamingos in Curacao, Sea Lions in the Galapagos, along with Bats, Dolphins, and a special island dedicated to Monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack treks through the pristine Corcovado National Park in search of the elusive jaguar. On a night hike, Jack comes face-to-face with the tapir, a rainforest relative of the rhinoceros.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack to the Future
programme.desc: Today, it’s a two-for-one special, as Jack travels to each location TWICE! Cheetahs, rhinos, manatees, kangaroos and more! Join Jack for time-traveling tour through natural history.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for an adventure with rare and unique animals that all wear white. Arctic wolves, beluga whales, polar bears, white zebras and even an albino alligator!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an unforgettable journey from Borneo to Kuala Lampur! See how conservation work on the front lines is protecting Malaysia's unique and diverse wildlife – like adorable orangutans, slithering snakes and two species of elephants!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Come along for a countdown adventure with the loving moms of the animal kingdom!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading to the southern tip of Chile to bring you this adventure. Kicking off this trip in a town that pays serious homage to the famous explorer Magellan, Jack boards a boat for Magdalena Island home to a breeding colony of Magellanic Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago is home to beautiful beaches and pristine waters, and it's also home to a high concentration of Bats! Jack hikes into a remote cave for an up-close look at the beneficial species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores biomes around the world, and the creatures that live there, like Lions, Black Caiman, Tiger Sharks, Tarantulas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for all-canine countdown. Meet working dogs on patrol to save rhinos and find lost hikers, get a look at rare populations of African wild dogs, and meet some amazing dogs that provide love and companionship.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
